title: ワガハイがテイオー先輩だ！

text_block_list.text: One day, I spot Tokai Teio in a slump.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Where did I go wrong?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well you see, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hey, Teio! I want to ask you something!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
A question? For me? Sure, I'll answer any and all
queries you've got!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Okay... I'll get straight to it. What is the secret to
your strength, Teio?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, you really don't beat around the bush.
Why do you ask?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well... I ran in a scrimmage recently, but I wasn't
happy with my performance at all.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I wish I could get the crowds going like you do,
Teio!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So I thought maybe if you could give me some
advice, I could become a great runner like you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So, you think I'm great... I see, I see. And you
want me to teach you the secret of my Teio
tenacity?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I remember asking something like this
once too.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Nah, just talking to myself. ♪ Hmmm, what did
Prez end up telling me back then?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! "Everyone possesses their own unique
strengths, which through rigorous effort can lead
them to greatness."

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Uh... What?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And that's what happened. My speech had no
effect on her.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Everyone gets emotional when Prez says it,
though...
choice_data_list: I think your own words might go down better.
I think your own words might go down better.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: My own words...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you're right. Thinking about it, Kita was inspired through watching my running.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Not sure if I'll sound as impressive as Prez,
but...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'll try speaking from the heart!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, there you are! Heeey, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh... Teio?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Sorry about earlier! I didn't understand what you
were saying, but it's my fault! I should study
harder...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
No, I was the one in the wrong back there. All I
did was copy Prez's words.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So this time, I've come to tell you the secret to
my Teio tenacity, plain and simple. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All I can say is: don't give up on your dreams. No
matter what knocks you down.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I made the choice to hold on to my dream and keep running with it. To never give in. And that's the secret to my Teio tenacity!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: The secret is... to never give up!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
T-Teio... I swear I'll become strong like you! I
won't ever give up!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Wow, just look at Teio... She's so cool.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I feel so inspired after hearing her words!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you see that? My juniors were totally
admiring me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I was pretty cool if I say so myself! ♪ You agree, right? Wasn't I the coolest?
choice_data_list: Just as cool as the student council president.
Keep doing your best to earn their admiration!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Right? And I didn't even have to use Prez's words
to inspire everyone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But that's not the end of this! I need to work
harder and surpass her!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'll be needing you until then, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yup, yup! I've gotta work hard. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I've got an idea! What about holding my
very own lecture every day?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I must impart the teachings of my secret
strength for all to know!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, why'd you go quiet? Something wrong with
what I said? C'mon! Tell me, Trainer!
